title: L'ingénieux hidalgo Don Quichotte de la Manche - Tome II
summaries: "L'ingénieux hidalgo Don Quichotte de la Manche - Tome II" by Miguel de Cervantes is a Spanish novel published in 1615. This second part continues the adventures of Alonso Quijano, a minor nobleman who loses his sanity from reading chivalric romances and becomes the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his earthy squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on misguided quests that blur fantasy and reality. As their journey unfolds, the idealistic Don Quixote and pragmatic Sancho increasingly influence each other, creating a profound exploration of illusion versus reality.
